# statusgator_subscriber (Resource)

Manages a StatusGator status page subscriber.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Add a subscriber to receive status updates
resource "statusgator_subscriber" "admin" {
  board_id          = "my-board-id"
  email             = "admin@example.com"
  skip_confirmation = true
}

# Subscriber requiring email confirmation
resource "statusgator_subscriber" "user" {
  board_id          = "my-board-id"
  email             = "user@example.com"
  skip_confirmation = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `board_id` (String) The ID of the board this subscriber belongs to.
- `email` (String) The email address of the subscriber. Must be a valid email format.

### Optional

- `skip_confirmation` (Boolean) Whether to skip the confirmation email. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `confirmed` (Boolean) Whether the subscriber has confirmed their email.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the subscriber.
